operators.name: fence-agents-remediation
operators.description: Fence Agents Remediation Operator uses well-known agents to fence and remediate unhealthy nodes. The remediation includes rebooting the unhealthy node using a fence agent, and then evicting workloads from the unhealthy node.

operators.name: fqdn-egress-operator
operators.description: Creates and maintains NetworkPolicies that supports outbound flows based on FQDNs
